title: Everbuild EVBS2CONADH Stick 2 All Purpose Contact Adhesive Tube (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
SUITABLE FOR DIY AND PROFESSIONAL USE – Bond PU foam or mineral wool panels to plasterboard or adhere metals with minimal effort.
IDEAL FOR COMMON SURFACES – Use it with rubber, most plastics, leather, cork, lino, rigid PVC and laminate. It even outperforms most conventional wood glues.
INTERNAL AND EXTERNAL USE – Compatible with indoor and outdoor use where you need a fast and reliable bond.
EXCELLENT WEATHERING AND AGEING – Premium-grade rubber-based formula for a long-lasting contact adhesive that stands the test of weather and time.
LONG OPEN TIME – Dries to a touch-dry finish in around 20 minutes, giving you plenty of time to apply and prepare to add pressure.
description: From the manufacturer Everbuild – A Sika Company The UK and Ireland’s largest manufacturer of sealants, adhesives, DIY products, powders and building chemicals. Everbuild are proud to be home to the trade’s most respected products which have been enhanced over the years by class-leading research and facilities. With unique technology including i-Cure and Active Resin Technology, Everbuild’s product development activity is relentlessly setting industry standards at the highest quality and leading the field in solving the problems of the future, today.
